netNewMrrAttribution.grain: weekly by event_date (America/New_York), rolled up by channel and campaign
netNewMrrAttribution.formula: net_new_mrr_attributed = new_logo_mrr + expansion_mrr + trial_conversion_mrr - refund_mrr - churn_mrr_offset
exclusions: fully unattributed conversions routed to channel=unknown
netNewMrrAttribution.assistedAttributionRule: 70% credit to last non-direct touch, 30% credit to first qualifying touch; direct-only paths get 100% direct
netNewMrrAttribution.trialConversionRule: Include only when trial converts to paid and first successful invoice posts; use conversion date for recognition

telemetryGaps: GSC_API_KEY missing in runtime for non-placeholder sessions/CTR.
KV_REST_API_URL and/or KV_REST_API_TOKEN missing in runtime for non-placeholder CVR/EPC/RPM.
Subscription-grade net new MRR source is not wired; current value is revenue proxy.
